queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Adobe AIR' AND publisher LIKE 'HARMAN International%';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Adobe AIR' AND publisher LIKE 'HARMAN International%' AND version_compare(version, '51.3.3.1') < 0);

refs.b393fb66:
# Learn more about .exe install scripts:
# http://fleetdm.com/learn-more-about/exe-install-scripts
#
# Adobe AIR (HARMAN) ships a self-extracting installer wrapping an MSI. Silent
# install per the winget manifest is -silent; -eulaAccepted suppresses the
# license prompt on first run.

$exeFilePath = "${env:INSTALLER_PATH}"

try {

$processOptions = @{
  FilePath = "$exeFilePath"
  ArgumentList = "-silent -eulaAccepted"
  PassThru = $true
  Wait = $true
}

# Start process and track exit code
$process = Start-Process @processOptions
$exitCode = $process.ExitCode

# Prints the exit code
Write-Host "Install exit code: $exitCode"
Exit $exitCode

} catch {
  Write-Host "Error: $_"
  Exit 1
}
